expectations.evidence: Output contains all required sections: [Context], [Task], [Output Constraint], and all four elements (Practical Terminology and Jargon, Hidden Preconditions, Beginner's Traps, Rules of Thumb). Also includes '>>> CONTINUE FROM HERE <<<' instruction.
Entire file is written in English despite the Korean input prompt.

DOMAIN expanded from 'data analysis' to 12 sub-areas: EDA, statistical inference, hypothesis testing, data visualization and storytelling, SQL extraction, BI reporting, dashboard design, ETL/ELT, data warehousing, KPI frameworks, A/B testing, cohort/funnel analysis, data governance.

GOAL synthesized into 6 dimensions: define project scope, evaluate specialist work quality, ask right technical questions, understand infrastructure/tooling decisions, set meaningful milestones, make informed strategic decisions — all framed for a complete beginner.
All fixed template phrases preserved verbatim: 'You are a top-tier expert who has spent 20+ years in this domain', 'Output Volume: Absolute Maximum', 'Curse of Knowledge'.
